sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 2025-09-26 분기 매출 124억 5,500만 달러, 영업이익 39억 8,200만 달러 — 지역 편중 영업구조와 신흥시장·환율 리스크가 핵심이다

keyPoints.text: 3개월 SG&A는 $3,618 million으로 직전 기간 $3,636 million 대비 $18 million 감소했고, 주된 원인은 연간 인센티브 비용 하락이었다.

riskChanges.text: 회사 자료는 Item 1A의 기존 항목 외에도, 현재 알려지지 않았거나 현재는 중요하지 않다고 판단한 사안도 사업·재무상태·향후 실적을 실질적으로 훼손시킬 수 있다고 경고한다.
회사는 여러 국가에서의 경제·정치·규제 불확실성을 핵심 위험으로 제시하며, 특히 developing and emerging markets 노출을 별도로 강조해 지역별 거시환경 민감도를 부각한다.
3개월 동안 환율 변동이 SG&A를 1% 증가시켰다는 점은 통화 요인이 비용에 즉시 반영되는 실재 리스크라는 점을 보여준다.

businessChanges.text: 인수·매각은 ‘순운영수익’ 변화에서 구조적 변화분을 분리해 제시하며, 기간 비교 시 M&A의 기여분을 보정해 해석하려는 재무 표시 방식이 적용됐다.

financialHighlights.text: 매출은 124억 5,500만 달러, 영업이익은 39억 8,200만 달러, 순이익은 36억 9,600만 달러로 분기 핵심 실적 규모가 제시된다.
총자산은 1,060억 4,500만 달러, 현금및현금성자산은 127억 3,200만 달러로 확인돼 유동성 및 재무기반을 가늠할 수 있다.

watchItems.text: 병입 파트너 보유 구조에 따라 매출 인식 시점이 달라지므로, 다음 분기에는 파트너 구조 변경이 영업구조 지표와 함께 이어지는지 모니터링하는 것이 중요하다.
회사 설명은 증자보다 debt financing 선호를 분명히 하므로, SG&A 3개월 $3,618 million 수준의 비용 민감도와 신흥시장·규제·환율 변수의 동시 움직임이 자본비용과 결합해 이익 안정성에 미칠 영향을 함께 점검해야 한다.

Quarter ended 2025-09-26 total assets = 1,060억 4,500만 달러 (USD 106.045B; 106,045 million), XBRL range instant..2025-09-26.
Quarter ended 2025-09-26 cash and cash equivalents = 127억 3,200만 달러 (USD 12.732B; 12,732 million), XBRL range instant..2025-09-26.

Revenues” below. The Company sells concentrates and syrups to both consolidated and unconsolidated bottling partners. The ownership structure of our bottling partners impacts the timing of recognizing concentrate revenue and concentrate sales volume. When we sell concentrates or syrups to our consolidated bottling partners, we do not recognize the concentrate revenue or concentrate sales volume until the bottling partner has sold finished products manufactured from the concentrates or syrups to a third party. When we sell concentrates or syrups to our unconsolidated bottling partners, we recognize the concentrate revenue and concentrate sales volume when the concentrates or syrups are sold to the bottling partner. The subsequent sale of the finished products manufactured from the concentrates or syrups to a third party does not impact the timing of recognizing the concentrate revenue or

Liquidity, Capital Resources and Financial Position — Foreign Exchange” below. 39 “Acquisitions and divestitures” generally refers to acquisitions and divestitures of brands or businesses, some of which the Company considers to be structural changes. The impact of acquisitions and divestitures is the difference between the change in net operating revenues and the change in what our net operating revenues would have been if we removed the net operating revenues associated with an acquisition or a divestiture from either the current year or the prior year, as applicable. Management believes that quantifying the impact that acquisitions and divestitures had on the Company’s net operating revenues provides investors with useful information to enhance their understanding of the Company’s net operating revenue performance by improving their ability to compare our period-to-period results. General and Administrative Expenses During the three months ended September 26, 2025, selling, general and administrative expenses were $3,618 million, compared to $3,636 million during the three months ended September 27, 2024, a decrease of $18 million. This decrease was primarily due to lower annual incentive expense, partially offset by increased advertising expense. During the nine months ended September 26, 2025, selling, general and administrative expenses were $10,322 million, compared to $10,536 million during the nine months ended September 27, 2024, a decrease of $214 million, or 2%. The decrease was primarily due to the refranchising of certain of our bottling operations and lower annual incentive expense.
